data.title: Bitcoin Price Flat as Ray Dalio Warns 'Something Worse Than a Recession' Looming
data.description:
Dalio said the president's economic policies could lead to "an international conflict in a way that is highly disruptive to the world economy. "
source: https://decrypt.co/314689/bitcoin-price-ray-dalio-worse-than-recession

data.title: Investment bank Jefferies: Bitcoin mining profitability fell 7.4% in March
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Investment bank Jefferies data shows that Bitcoin mining profitability fell 7.4% in March due to an 11.2% drop in the average price of Bitcoin and a 9.1% drop in transaction fees.
Jefferies also said that U.S.-listed Bitcoin mining companies mined a total of 3,534 Bitcoins in March, compared with 3,002 in February. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Says “Good Social Philosophy” is Needed for the Upper Layers of Ethereum
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin, Ethereum co-founder, argued that “good social philosophy” is needed for the upper application layer regarding Ethereum.
source: https://zycrypto.com/vitalik-buterin-says-good-social-philosophy-is-needed-for-the-upper-layers-of-ethereum/

data.title: Flow Traders, Auros, Arrington Lead $KERNEL Launch on Binance
data.description:
$KERNEL launched with Flow Traders, Auros, Arrington Capital as key market makers on Binance Megadrop, ensuring liquidity and stability.
source: https://coincu.com/332118-kernel-launch-binance-flow-auros

data.title: ZachXBT: Reef Finance founder allegedly sought collateral tokens for loans days before OM crash
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain Detective ZachXBT posted on the X platform: "The two names I keep hearing about the Mantra incident are Denko (founder of Reef Finance) and Fukogoryushu. They allegedly contacted some people a few days before OM's 90% plunge triggered the crash, asking for large-scale loans to be collateralized by their OM.
For those who are not familiar with Reef Finance, the project was delisted from Binance in October 2024, and had an $80 million over-the-counter transaction with Alameda in 2021. REEF has also had similar market manipulation incidents in the past."

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 197 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 5,602 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 197 BTC today, of which Invesco Galaxy had an inflow of 353 BTC. The institution currently holds 5,206 BTC, worth US$439.87 million; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 5,602 ETH, of which VanEck had an outflow of 2,929 ETH. VanEck currently holds 43,204 ETH, worth US$71.72 million.

data.title: Famous Crypto Influencer Explains Why Shiba Inu Price Is Unlikely To Ever Hit Lofty $1 Mark
data.description:
The prospect of Shiba Inu (SHIB) attaining the highly anticipated $1 mark has captured the imaginations of many in the cryptosphere.
source: https://zycrypto.com/famous-crypto-influencer-explains-why-shiba-inu-price-is-unlikely-to-ever-hit-lofty-1-mark/

data.title: Google Demands MiCA Licensing for Crypto Ads in 30 European Countries
data.description:
Google will require crypto advertisers in Europe to be MiCA- or CASP-licensed and certified by Google starting April 23, 2025.

The post Google Demands MiCA Licensing for Crypto Ads in 30 European Countries first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/14/google-mica-crypto-ads-europe/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=google-mica-crypto-ads-europe

data.title: Musk Predicts AI Advancements in Autonomous Driving
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk has stated that artificial intelligence will soon surpass the best human reasoning capabilities. He also mentioned that a comprehensive and pure general AI solution for fully autonomous driving will soon emerge, relying solely on cameras, Tesla AI chips, and Tesla AI software.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated 21.4437 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 21.4437 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 17.7454 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 3.6984 million US dollars.
